creator: 97sa700a@utmjb.utm.my
text:
just installed 2.2.5, my machine has old 3com etherlinkII nwork card.
setting on card: i/o base 300, memory base c8000 however no jumper for irq.
checked with s/ware it uses irq 5.

installation went ok (think so), not detect any nwork card. when reboot after
complete installation i got this message:

ed0 not found at 0x280

fatal trap 12 : page fault while in level mode
fault virtual address = 0xefc00000
fault core = supervisor read, page not present
instruction pointer = 0x8:0xf01d6b43
stack pointer = 0x10:0xefbffefc
frame pointer = 0x10:0xefbffefc
code segment = base 0x0, limit 0xfffff, type 0x1b
		= DPC0, press 1, def32 1, gran 1
processor eflags = interrupt enabled, resume, IOPL = 0
current process = 0 ()
interrupt mask = net tty bio
panic page fault
Auto reboot in 15 seconds - press a key on the console to abort

How-To-Repeat: it goes on and on with the card installed and gone if i remove the nwork card.
didn't test with other because can't afford to have a newer one [i'm a poor student - any donation for good working nwork card :) ]
